title: JUST ANNOUNCED: mondayDB rolled out to all over 186,000 customers
excerpt:
mondayDB 1.0, the initial release of its brand-new infrastructure for the monday.com Work OS platform, has been completed and rolled out to all over 186,000 customers! Read the official release for more information.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
mondayDB 1.0, the initial release of its brand-new infrastructure for the monday.com Work OS platform, has been completed and rolled out to all over 186,000 customers! Read the official release for more information.

But that is not all, our community has an opportunity to sit down with the experts, who were a part of the development of mondayDB. This event will be happening in two different times to ensure that our community members from all over the world are able to attend: 5PM AEST (9AM CEST) and 10AM EST (4pm CEST ).

Are you ready for faster boards?!
